mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.pressure, i.traffic as flow, i.temperature, i.shake as vibration, i.data_status, i.sensor_id, CONCAT(a.province, a.city, a.district) as area_name, p.name as pipeline_name, i.create_time as monitor_time FROM inspection i LEFT JOIN sensor s ON i.sensor_id = s.id LEFT JOIN area a ON s.area_id = a.id LEFT JOIN pipe p ON s.pipeline_id = p.id WHERE i.id = #{id} ORDER BY i.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inspection ( pressure, traffic, temperature, shake, data_status, realtime_picture, sensor_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{pressure}, #{flow}, #{temperature}, #{vibration}, #{dataStatus}, #{realtimePicture}, #{sensorId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection SET pressure = #{pressure}, traffic = #{flow}, temperature = #{temperature}, shake = #{vibration}, sensor_id = #{sensorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) as total, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN i.data_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CHAR) as normal, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN i.data_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CHAR) as abnormal, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(i.create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CHAR) as today FROM inspection i
LEFT JOIN sensor s ON i.sensor_id = s.id WHERE s.area_id = #{areaId}
